zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Gisburn於大約1364年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯時，她的父親John Gisburn Mayor of York29歲，母親Ellen de Baguley28歲。她於1382年與Sir William Plumpton在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年12月5日在英國越可爾斯波福斯享年60歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯波福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Gisburn于大约1364年出生在英国英格兰越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯时，她的父亲John Gisburn Mayor of York29岁，母亲Ellen de Baguley28岁。她于1382年与Sir William Plumpton在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年12月5日在英国越可爾斯波福斯享年60岁，埋葬在英国越可爾斯波福斯。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gisborne
meanings: English: locative name from Gisburn (WR Yorks), recorded as Gisilburn in 1285, Gisebourgh in 1301.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Gisburn was born about 1364, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Gisburn Mayor of York, was 29 and her mother, Ellen de Baguley, was 28. She married Sir William Plumpton in 1382, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 5 December 1423, in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Gisburn est née environ 1364, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Gisburn Mayor of York, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Baguley, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Plumpton en 1382, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 décembre 1423, à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Gisburn um 1364 in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gisburn Mayor of York 29 und ihre Mutter Ellen de Baguley 28. Sie hat 1382 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Plumpton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Dezember 1423 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gisburn è nata il circa 1364 nel Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Gisburn Mayor of York, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Ellen de Baguley, aveva 28 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Alice Gisburn(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gisburn Mayor of York(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen de Baguley(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 Sir William Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 12월 5일 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gisburn nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Gisburn Mayor of York, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ellen de Baguley, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Plumpton em 1382, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1423, em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Gisburn родилась около 1364 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Gisburn Mayor of York было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Baguley, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Plumpton в 1382 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 декабря 1423 г. в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия.
